s: In 2013, Michael Roth suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.200, WHIP 1.500, SO 17, WAR 0.300.
In 2014, Michael Roth suited up for LAA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.760, WHIP 2.030, SO 9, WAR -0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAA -> TEX).
In 2016, Michael Roth suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 14.730, WHIP 3.000, SO 3, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined TEX.
